title.en: AURA-7: The Essence of Organic Flow

description.ko: AURA-7은 자연과 기술 사이의 매끄러운 전환을 구현하며, 지속적인 조화와 자연스러운 진화의 감각을 일깨우는 리듬감 있는 유체 역학과 부드럽고 생동감 넘치는 곡선을 선보입니다.
description.en: AURA-7 embodies the seamless transition between nature and technology, showcasing rhythmic fluid dynamics and soft, living curves that evoke a sense of continuous harmony and natural evolution.

prompt: Cinematic close-up of AURA-7, featuring fluid organic shapes and translucent pearlescent textures, swirling liquid patterns, soft rhythmic curves, bioluminescent accents, high-end product photography, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, iridescent lighting.
